title: architecture-linter config (.context.yml)
description: Configuration schema for the architecture-linter tool. Place as .context.yml in your project root.

extends.description: Extend a built-in preset. Supported values: 'mvc', 'clean', 'hexagonal', 'ddd', 'layered'.

architecture.description: Defines the architectural layers that exist in your project.

layers.description: Ordered list of layer names (singular). Both singular and plural directory names are matched. Glob patterns (containing *, ?, or /) are matched via minimatch.

rules.description: Per-layer import rules. Key is the layer name as declared in architecture.layers.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for files to exclude from scanning (project-relative).

aliases.description: Module alias mappings (e.g. @ → src). Keys are alias prefixes; values are relative directory paths.

layerRule.description: Rules for a single architectural layer.

cannot_import.description: Blacklist: this layer must not import from any of the listed layers.

can_only_import.description: Whitelist: this layer may only import from the listed layers. Mutually exclusive with cannot_import.

files.description: Optional glob pattern (project-relative). Rule is scoped to source files matching this pattern.

severity.description: 'error' (default) causes a non-zero exit code. 'warn' prints the violation but exits 0.
